data.body:
Goal:
Add a new Setlist screen to the beats UI. It should appear as the first top navigation button, show summary cards for one or more execution-plan beats with descriptions, and render the selected execution plan as a full-page gantt-style chart where the y-axis is execution priority (next at top, last at bottom) and the x-axis uses equal-width task slots rather than time.

Verification:
1. Open the beats UI and confirm the top navigation shows Setlist as the first button.
2. Navigate to Setlist and confirm the summary widget lists execution-plan beats with descriptions.
3. Select an execution plan and confirm the main body renders a gantt-style chart with priority ordered top-to-bottom and equal-width horizontal task slots.
4. Run project validation for the touched area and confirm it passes.

Constraints:
- Follow the repo worktree policy and do implementation in a dedicated git worktree.
- Preserve existing beats views and navigation behavior outside the new Setlist entry.
data.title: Implement setlist screen
